{Smriti floating eye — xovi/qt-resource-rebuilder patch.

Injects a small always-on-top eye button into the document view
(SceneViewGestures.qml, same AFFECT target as rm-hacks' gestures.qmd).
Drawn UI, NOT ink: no lamp round trips, nothing on the page.

  dash   = daemon idle        tap -> start session
  pupil  = session watching   tap -> stop session

Talks to the daemon through files (QML XHR can read/write file:// —
same trick rm-hacks uses for colorSet.json). smriti-eye-watch bridges
/home/root/.smriti/eye-cmd to the daemon over the tailnet and refreshes
/home/root/.smriti/state.}

AFFECT [[17298303916558156758]]
	TRAVERSE [[254504370080162629]]
		LOCATE BEFORE ALL
		INSERT {
		Rectangle {
			id: smritiEyeUi
			property bool watching: false
			width: 56
			height: 56
			radius: 28
			color: "white"
			border.color: "black"
			border.width: 3
			z: 9999
			anchors.right: parent.right
			anchors.bottom: parent.bottom
			anchors.rightMargin: 18
			anchors.bottomMargin: 18

			Rectangle {
				anchors.centerIn: parent
				width: 16
				height: 16
				radius: 8
				color: "black"
				visible: smritiEyeUi.watching
			}
			Rectangle {
				anchors.centerIn: parent
				width: 24
				height: 5
				color: "black"
				visible: !smritiEyeUi.watching
			}

			Timer {
				interval: 3000
				running: true
				repeat: true
				triggeredOnStart: true
				onTriggered: {
					var xhr = new XMLHttpRequest();
					xhr.open("GET", "file:///home/root/.smriti/state");
					xhr.onreadystatechange = function() {
						if (xhr.readyState === XMLHttpRequest.DONE) {
							smritiEyeUi.watching = (xhr.responseText.indexOf("watching") === 0);
						}
					};
					xhr.send();
				}
			}

			MouseArea {
				anchors.fill: parent
				onClicked: {
					var xhr = new XMLHttpRequest();
					xhr.open("PUT", "file:///home/root/.smriti/eye-cmd");
					xhr.send(smritiEyeUi.watching ? "stop" : "start");
					smritiEyeUi.watching = !smritiEyeUi.watching;
				}
			}
		}
		}
	END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
